calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Hobson appeared by zoom for and with Michael Baker by zoom.

Mr. Hobson stated that the real property is situated in San Francisco, but if the court feels venue is appropriate in Santa Clara County where the decedent passed away, he would ask that the case be transferred. Discussion was held with regard to transferring of the case incurring additional costs. Mr. Hobson stated that it seems the best course of action is to take this off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
